task_completion.description: Checks if the agent navigated to the Compliance Findings section and opened the form to create a new finding.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba web interface is visible, showing a 'New Compliance Finding', 'Add Finding', or similar form/modal.

task_completion.description: Checks if the exact required title was entered for the finding.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Title input field contains exactly 'Missing Cryptographic Key Management Procedure'.

task_completion.description: Checks if the description explains the gap and includes the required phrases.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description text area contains text explaining the gap, specifically including the phrases 'cryptographic keys', 'A.10.1.2', and 'key management'.

task_completion.description: Checks if the deadline or expiration date is set to the required date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Deadline or Expiration Date field is set to '2025-09-30'.

task_completion.description: Checks if the compliance finding was successfully saved or submitted to the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Item created successfully') is visible, or the newly created finding is shown in the Compliance Findings list/table view.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent interacted with the Eramba graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser navigating the Eramba application, rather than a terminal, script, or text editor.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing curl commands or API requests to create the Eramba finding.

integrity.description: Verifies the data was entered into the actual application form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required text and dates are visible inside the standard Eramba input fields (text boxes, date pickers, text areas), not just written in a scratchpad or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Title: 'Missing Cryptographic Key Management Procedure'. Required Description Phrases: 'cryptographic keys', 'A.10.1.2', and 'key management'. Target Deadline/Expiration: '2025-09-30'.
